DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Mustafa Nuristani 408-759-3274 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Sharon Nagle, Esq. 925-933-7777 Bold Polisner Maddow Nelson & Judson for Defendants.

The Court's tentative ruling is for parties to appear. Hearing is held. Ms. Nagle and Mr. Nuristani present argumnets. The Court shares its comments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1- DEFENDANTS HONORABLE HARRY M. DORFMAN, JUDGE OF THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SUED ERRONEOUSLY AS JUDGE HARRY WARSONDORFMAN, HON. ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO, AND BRANDON RILEY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

The Demurrer to the First Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. The case is dismissed with prejudice. In addition, all future hearing dates are vacated.

Order is signed.

Visiting Judge: Cecilia P. Castellanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/CC)

MOTION TO STRIKE Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Mustafa Nuristani 408-759-3274 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Sharon Nagle, Esq. 925-933-7777 Bold Polisner Maddow Nelson & Judson for Defendants.

The Court's tentative ruling is for parties to appear. Hearing is held. Ms. Nagle and Mr. Nuristani present argumnets. The Court shares its comments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2- DEFENDANTS HONORABLE HARRY M. DORFMAN, JUDGE OF THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SUED ERRONEOUSLY AS JUDGE HARRY WARSONDORFMAN, HON. ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO, AND BRANDON RILEY'S MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

The motion to strike PLaintiff's second amended complaint is Granted. In addition, all future hearing dates are vacated.

Order is signed.
